chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-589 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Samiullah Rind Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh. ----- Matter pertains to an allegation of blocking the passage of water from a designated Watercourse, with the complaint being that the Department is not taking appropriate action. This Petition is not maintainable in view of SBLR 2021 Sindh 881. Petition is dismissed along with pending Application. However, the Petitioner will pursue his remedy before the Department which will decide the case within the parameters of law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
